channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Obama, Trump and Biden lead tributes to Jesse Jackson: ‘one of America’s greatest patriots’
item.description: Barack Obama, Joe Biden, Al Sharpton, Donald Trump and more react to death of the civil rights leader at the age of 84 Jesse Jackson, civil rights lea...

item.title: Palantir moves headquarters to Miami amid tech’s growing retreat to Florida
item.description: Data analytics firm moves from Denver after about six years and joins host of businesses relocating to south Florida Palantir announced on Tuesday tha...

item.title: Role of far-right ‘manosphere’ in homophobic attacks on men to be investigated in Victoria
item.description: Exclusive: Greens move to call parliamentary inquiry after series of ‘disturbing’ attacks targeting gay and bisexual men lured via dating apps Follow ...

item.title: Peru’s president ousted in ‘express impeachment’ after just four months
item.description: Interim president José Jerí voted out by country’s congress amid scandal concerning secretive meetings Peru’s interim president has been forced out of...

item.title: Australia news live: Randa Abdel-Fattah to appear at Sydney writers’ festival; record renewable capacity added to grid
item.description: A total of 2.1GW of wind and solar power came on to the grid in the three months to December. Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email , f...

item.title: GB curlers on brink of early exit after Canada defeat
item.description: Team GB's Winter Olympics curling medal hopes are now in serious jeopardy after Bruce Mouat's world champions were beaten 9-5 by Canada in Cortina.

item.title: Ros Atkins on...unanswered Andrew questions
item.description: The BBC's Analysis Editor Ros Atkins looks at the questions around the way Buckingham Palace has responded to the various accusations against the King...

item.title: Police assessing Stansted Airport private flights over Epstein ties
item.description: Essex Police says it is assessing information in relation to private flights into and out of the airport.

item.title: Dual nationals face scramble for British passports as new rules come into force
item.description: Entry requirements to the UK for dual nationals are being overhauled as part of sweeping changes to the immigration system.

item.title: Ex-Mail reporter denies making payments for Lawrence information
item.description: Stephen Wright was giving evidence at the privacy case brought by the mother of the murdered teenager and others against the newspaper's publisher.
